response.explanation: I'll try to visit the syringe service program a couple of times this week to get some clean needles, but old habits die hard and I'll probably still end up sharing syringes with my friend a few times.

I plan to visit the syringe service program twice this week to get clean needles and learn more about their services. I will continue to inject drugs daily, but I will make sure to use new needles each time to reduce my risk of getting infected again.
